title: [CS] SCP
description: We intend on this mod covering all of your SCP related needs to Secure. Contain. and Protect. Anomalies, and unusual phenomon!
body:
![**[CS] SCP**](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/338bc0c4814cddf6e960b8f72138d03af77ad5c4.png)

Welcome to **\[CS\] SCP**, our mod aims to bring decorations and anomalies from the **SCP** lore into **Minecraft!**

We have several plans and intentions for the future, including many more anomalies, more containment procedures, hybrids, and more usages for existing anomalies in terms of utility & combat.

https://youtu.be/AjIJT-7ZHno

**Acknowledge that currently this mod is the equivalent to a BETA**

**STUFF IS SUBJECT TO CHANGE, PLEASE JOIN OUR DISCORD TO GIVE SUGGESTIONS AND BUG REPORTS.**

Quite a lot of our content is currently gated behind 2 structures, & SCP-914 | SCP-049.
The structures spawn in Deserts, & Cold biomes.
SCP-049's Hut spawns in swamps.

Fragments of SCP-914 can be located within said structures! 

We have plans to expand our survival aspect, as you may notice some SCPs are currently unobtainable **(Primarily the Entities)**, we plan on quickly solving this after a few quick updates, its just we were very excited to release our work.
